overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban downtown environment in a video game (GTA V style), featuring wet pavement reflections, neon city lights, street lamps, and modern office buildings. The camera moves steadily along the sidewalk as rain falls heavily, creating a moody, atmospheric scene.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy urban street corner at night. The camera moves forward along a wet concrete sidewalk, passing a red traffic signal pole on the right. A modern office building with illuminated windows lines the left side, while street lamps provide artificial lighting through the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk with concrete planter wall

events.description: camera turns slightly right to follow the curved sidewalk path
pedestrian enters frame walking in the opposite direction on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating the curved sidewalk while passing a low concrete planter wall with bushes

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk, briefly visible

large illuminated advertising screen mounted on a building facade
large leafy trees lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along a curved sidewalk bordered by a concrete planter wall on the left. Large trees line the path ahead, and a digital billboard becomes visible in the distance on the right. A pedestrian briefly appears walking in the opposite direction as the camera navigates the gentle curve of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown sidewalk with advertising displays

events.description: white sedan drives past on the wet street to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the open sidewalk toward distant illuminated skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving down the rain-soaked street, passing from right to left

entered.detail: tall buildings with illuminated windows visible through the rain in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider downtown area with the digital billboard now prominent on the right. Large mature trees line the immediate sidewalk, while distant skyscrapers glow through the rainy night. A white sedan drives past on the street to the right, its headlights cutting through the rain as the camera continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk that gradually opens from a narrow street corner into a wide, glowing downtown vista. It begins by moving forward past a red traffic signal and a modern office building with illuminated windows, where street lamps cast a cold light through the heavy rain. As the camera navigates a gentle curve, the path is bordered by a concrete planter wall and large trees, while a digital billboard emerges in the distance and a lone pedestrian passes by. The scene then expands into a broader city center where the billboard becomes a prominent light source and distant skyscrapers glow through the downpour. Finally, the camera continues its steady advance as a white sedan drives past on the right, its headlights cutting through the rainy night.
